findings.issue: open_url() closes current window with 'ctrl+w' before opening URL, causing unintended data loss
findings.suggestion: Remove pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'w') or add user confirmation before closing
findings.est_impact: Users may lose unsaved work when opening URLs

findings.issue: type_text() uses pyautogui.typewrite() which fails with special characters and non-ASCII text
findings.suggestion: Use pyautogui.write() or handle special characters separately
findings.est_impact: Text input will silently fail for passwords, URLs, or non-ASCII input

findings.issue: click(), type(), scroll() commands lack bounds validation for screen coordinates
findings.suggestion: Validate x,y coordinates against screen size before execution
findings.est_impact: Clicks on non-existent screen areas will fail silently without feedback

findings.issue: No exception handling for int() conversion in click, scroll, and press commands
findings.suggestion: Wrap sys.argv conversions in try-except to handle invalid numeric input
findings.est_impact: Script crashes with ValueError on malformed arguments instead of user-friendly error
